The '''Elite Circle''' was the leading group of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] in the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]]. To get into this elite group, a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] had to be voted in by their peers. Members of the Circle were assigned special, large-scale missions, killing targets at the request of "big customers."<ref name="A Guide to the Star Wars Universe">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>

During his feud with the Guild, the gunslinger [[Gallandro/Legends|Gallandro]] killed over half of the Circle's membership, as well as many lower-level members of the Guild.<ref name="Han Solo and the Lost Legacy">''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''</ref> The survivors offered Gallandro a position with the Guild in response; though Gallandro refused the offer, the feud did end at that point.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref> This marked the only time in their history that the Guild defaulted on a contract. 

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' uses the term '''Inner Circle''' instead—a term which usually refers to the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]].
